results.title: Ronin Network - REKT
on_chain_signatures: approval of Sky Mavis validators to sign transactions on behalf of Axie DAO
red_flags: unrevoked whitelist access for signing transactions
large withdrawals from the Ronin Bridge contract
monitoring_rules: Monitor for unrevoked whitelist access for signing transactions
Detect large withdrawals from the Ronin Bridge contract
results.summary: The Ronin Network was hacked due to unrevoked whitelist access for signing transactions, allowing the attacker to drain $624M worth of assets. A real-time guard could have detected this by monitoring for unrevoked whitelist access and large withdrawals.

results.title: Wormhole - REKT
results.summary: The Wormhole bridge was exploited by providing a fraudulent 'SignatureSet', allowing the attacker to mint 120k whETH on Solana. A guard could have detected this by monitoring for unusual calls to 'verify_signatures' and 'complete_wrapped', and discrepancies between 'solana_program::sysvar::instructions' and 'solana_program'.

results.title: Euler Finance - REKT
red_flags: use of donateToReserves without debt health check
immediate withdrawal of inflated eToken collateral
monitoring_rules: BLOCK transactions involving donateToReserves without accompanying debt health checks
BLOCK large flash loans followed by immediate interaction with Euler Finance contracts
results.summary: The Euler Finance hack involved a flash loan and the misuse of the donateToReserves function, allowing attackers to create an unbacked debt position and withdraw assets. A guard could have blocked transactions involving donateToReserves without proper debt checks or large flash loans immediately interacting with Euler contracts.

results.title: Curve, Vyper - REKT
monitoring_rules: Detect reentrancy patterns in Vyper contracts using vulnerable versions
Monitor for large transactions involving vulnerable pools
results.summary: The hack exploited a compiler bug in Vyper, causing a reentrancy vulnerability in Curve pools. A reentrancy pattern in transactions involving vulnerable Vyper versions could have triggered a block.

results.title: ByBit - Rekt
red_flags: multisig signers approving seemingly legitimate transactions
hidden 'sweepERC20()' function in wallet implementation upgrade
monitoring_rules: Block transactions involving multisig wallets with unknown or suspicious functions
Monitor for hidden functions like 'sweepERC20()' in wallet upgrades
results.summary: Hackers tricked ByBit multisig signers into approving a seemingly legitimate transaction, which actually contained a hidden 'sweepERC20()' function that drained the exchange's cold wallet. A real-time guard could have detected and blocked the transaction by monitoring for unknown functions in wallet upgrades.

rules: Monitor for unrevoked whitelist access for signing transactions
